name: @wxyc/flowsheet-linked-reenrichment
description: WXYC one-shot re-enrichment of the BS#1443 enriched_no_match linked cohort (22,773 rows): Lane A flips cohort rows whose album already has populated album_metadata; Lane B re-looks-up the ~314 residual albums via LML's bulk endpoint with a fill-null UPSERT (BS#1638 / BS#1041 donor / LML#784).
